name: Isoka
description: Isoka is a female marine of significant rank in the filler Rainbow Mist Arc. She is first seen on the same ship with another marine, who was revealed to be Rapanui Pasqua.    ~!When she was young, she was a friend of Henzo and the only female member of the Pumpkin Pirates. She was also trapped in the Rainbow Mist. !~ (Source: Wikipedia)
